---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

I am a final-year Business Studies student at Dublin City University (DCU), specialising in Data Analytics, graduating in Summer 2026. I am tracking for First Class Honours based on my second and current year results.

I was born and raised in Kildare, and attended two Gaelscoils growing up in Kilcock and Lucan, achieving 566 points in my Leaving Certificate.

My interest in data analytics primarily comes from my 3rd year Intra placement in the digital team at PwC. During my 14 months there I had the opportunity to work on several very interesting analytics projects and gained experience with a wide range of tools. Going forward in my career I hope to continue using and devloping these skills working on meaningful projects.


## Skills

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Technical**

- Python & NumPy
- SQL
- Power BI & Power Automate
- Microsoft Excel (advanced)
- Databricks & Workbench
- SharePoint & Visio
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Professional**

- Data Analytics
- Stakeholder Communication
- Project Management
- Process Mapping
- Critical Thinking
- Fluent Irish Speaker
:::
:::

## Goals

I am looking for a graduate role with a focus on data analytics, where I can apply the technical and interpersonal skills developed during my degree and placement at PwC.
